candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the clean total line.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets; not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; best match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance agrees with balance sheet cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of period
candidates.why: Cash balance but for beginning of period, not balance-sheet row target.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Exact reported total for current liabilities; directly matches LCT.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities; not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: This appears in the current liabilities section and acts as the clean total for current interest-bearing debt; preferred over summing components.
Relevant maturity disclosure for current portion of debt, but likely incomplete versus the reported current debt total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of loans from financial institutions
candidates.why: Component of current debt, but would miss commercial papers/housing corporation loans if used alone.
Current borrowing component; relevant only if no clean total exists.
Current borrowing component; relevant only if no clean total exists.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current total debt line in the current liabilities section. Excludes lease liabilities because those are separately reported as 'Interest-bearing lease liabilities' and were not selected.

candidates.row_label: Current tax payables (based on profit for the financial year)
candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

final_choice.row_label: Current tax payables (based on profit for the financial year)

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line; best match for total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment, right -of-use asset
candidates.why: Separate right-of-use asset line; baseline PPEGT prefers the main PPE line, not lease-related assets.
Only a component of PPE, not the full reported PPE total.
Gross component, not total net PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit PPE line; did not use right-of-use asset line.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; best match for AT.
Balances to total assets but represents the liabilities/equity side, so inferior for AT.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because no AT candidates were provided; this is the explicit total assets row and is confidently correct.

candidates.why: Appears immediately after operating cash flow items including interest and taxes and before investing activities; most likely the net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Net cash before interests and taxes
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before interest and tax, but not the final operating cash flow figure.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because no OANCF candidates were provided. 'SubTotal' is positioned as the operating cash flow total after interest and taxes and before investing activities.
